title: Leonardo Pacheco
compiled_truth: Leonardo Pacheco is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-23 to 2002-02-21), Leonardo Pacheco sent 83 and received 257 emails, totalling 340 interactions. Top correspondents: [David Forster](people/david-forster) (77), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (76), [Mark Palmer](people/mark-palmer) (75), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (75), [Rahil Jafry](people/rahil-jafry) (75). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, archiving, attachments, savedmail.
